componentDescription: A versatile component for displaying content in a separate, layered window with customizable appearance and behavior.

buttonColor.description: Specifies the color of the close button.

iconSize.description: Determines the size of the close button icon.

shape.description: Defines the overall shape style of the modal container.

isFullScreen.description: Indicates whether the modal should occupy the full screen.

buttonPosition.description: Sets the position of the close button within the modal.

onClose.description: Callback function triggered when the modal is requested to close.

blur.description: Applies a blur effect to the modal's background overlay.

isOpen.description: Controls the visibility state of the modal.

isClosePrevented.description: If true, prevents the modal from closing when clicking outside or pressing escape.

position.description: Specifies the position of the modal on the screen.

shadow.description: Defines the shadow style or elevation applied to the modal container.
